title: Enchanted Golden Apple Recipe Data Pack
description: This simple Data Pack re-introduces the God Apple crafting Recipe.
body:
# Enchanted Golden Apple Recipe

This is just a simple recipe data pack, nothing special.

The item and recipe were introduced into the game on Release 1.3.1. The Recipe was later removed in Release 1.9

With 8 Blocks of Gold surrounding a regular apple you will have an Enchanted Golden Apple, Gapple, God Apple, or Enchanted Apple. Whatever you like to call it!

**Side Note**: The game will most likely tell you that the data pack is out of data depending on the version you are choosing to play but it works just fine 1.13-1.20

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1309cd14920e377a425fcc1f9fa7a697b7f95c1c.png)
